heading: Step 2: Begin the simulation.
body:
- Click **Select Regions**.

- Select the tab corresponding to the type of outage you want to simulate:

  Minority of Electable Nodes

  Select fewer than half of your electable nodes.

  Majority of Electable Nodes

  Select at least one more than half of your electable
  nodes and keep at least one electable node remaining.

  After selecting a majority of your electable nodes, your
  replica set won't have a [primary node](manual/core/replica-set-members).
  This means that your replica set can't perform write
  operations and read operations that are not configured
  with a suitable [readPreference](manual/core/read-preference).

- (Optional) From the **Simulation Duration** dropdown, select the
  duration for the simulation to run before it automatically expires.
  This value defaults to `3` days.

- Select **Simulate Regional Outage** to begin the test.

  Atlas notifies you when the outage occurs.
